description_long: This is a modern electric locomotive painted in a vibrant red color with black and gray accents. The body is streamlined and rectangular, featuring a series of angular black graphics along the sides. The roof is equipped with two pantographs and various rooftop equipment, indicating it is designed for overhead electric power. The sides display several access panels and grilles, while the front and rear have large windows and headlights, with the front also showing a logo and signage. The undercarriage is detailed with visible wheels, suspension, and mechanical components. The overall design suggests a contemporary, high-performance train suitable for urban or intercity passenger service.
description: A sleek, red electric locomotive with black accents, rooftop pantographs, and detailed undercarriage. Features large windows and angular graphics, designed for modern passenger rail service.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the red locomotive, with black graphics, rooftop pantographs, and detailed undercarriage components.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large windows, headlights, signage, and the streamlined nose of the locomotive.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, displaying the same red body, black graphics, and rooftop equipment.
description_view_3: Rear view, similar to the front, with large windows and visible rooftop details, but lacking the prominent signage seen on the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: large rectangular windows at each end
